# Kannamani Consultants Private Limited

> Government-compliant overseas recruitment and manpower consultancy based in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. Operating since 2005, connecting skilled and unskilled Indian workers with verified employers in the UAE, Gulf and Europe.

## About
- Founded: 2005 (21+ years)
- Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 93914 98731
- Email: info@kannamaniconsultants.com
- Focus: Interview co-ordination, candidate counselling, international recruitment support

## Destinations
United Arab Emirates (UAE), Oman, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Serbia and other parts of Europe.

## Sectors recruited for
Construction, Warehouse & Logistics, Manufacturing, Skilled Labor (electricians, plumbers, welders, HVAC technicians), and General / Unskilled Labor.

## Services
- International job placements with verified overseas employers
- Visa processing assistance
- Work permit processing
- Candidate documentation support
- Pre-departure counselling and overseas employment guidance
- Interview co-ordination

## Important note
Visa processing, offer letters and final recruitment are handled only by government licensed recruiting agents / employers. Kannamani Consultants provides recruitment support, interview coordination and candidate counselling only.

- About: https://kannamani.vercel.app/about.html
